productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Olive Duffle Bag
description: Style Note Perfect for that weekend trip, this duffel bag from united colors of benetton is a great option that can carry all your essentials when you head into the wilderness. Product Details Made of a blended material for durability Has one main zipped compartment with an inner zipped compartment Two short handles with padded grips and one long adjustable and removable strap with a broad grip for carrying ease Branded zips and sliders for easy use Branding appliquéd on the front Material and Care Blended Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Size Height: 43 cm Width: 59 cm Depth: 21 cm
